final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    input wire en,
    output reg [9:0] count
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            count <= 10'b0000000001;
        end else if (en) begin
            count <= {count[8:0], count[9]};
        end
    end

endmodule
